title: Notifications when column does not change
excerpt: How do I get Monday to send notifications when there is not a change in a column, especially if there is no date set either. I am using a check feature or I could use status, but I have multiple departments I would like …

posts.author: lambchop11179 (Penny)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I get Monday to send notifications when there is not a change in a column, especially if there is no date set either. I am using a check feature or I could use status, but I have multiple departments I would like to check off when something is done. However, how do I set up a reminder for the departments to do something if it hasn’t been done yet.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Penny,

You are able to set this up if there is an initial action established in the beginning of recipe, for example - when date arrives or when item is created - as this allows you to then set the condition for items that are not complete:

Screen Shot 2023-07-31 at 1.04.09 pm1002×554 30.7 KB

Is it possible for you to work something like this into your set up?

posts.author: lambchop11179 (Penny)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you but I didn’t have a date tied to the task, for the other departments involved. I think I figured it out by having my one deadline column keep changing the date once another department accomplished their part of the project.
